evals.prompt: Add login authentication to my Object UI app. I need a login page, route protection, and the user's role to control which dashboard cards are visible via schema expressions.
evals.expected_output: Provides AuthProvider setup, LoginForm usage, AuthGuard for routes, and pattern for injecting user role into SchemaRendererProvider dataSource for expression-based visibility.

evals.prompt: I need RBAC for my CRM: admins can do everything, sales reps can only edit their own contacts, and viewers are read-only. How do I set this up with Object UI permissions?
evals.expected_output: Provides PermissionProvider config with three roles, row-level permissions with owner filter, and usePermissions usage for conditional UI rendering.

evals.prompt: Set up multi-tenancy so each company sees their own branding (logo, colors) and data in our Object UI app.
evals.expected_output: Provides TenantProvider setup with fetchTenant, useTenantBranding for theming, and TenantScopedQuery for data isolation.

evals.prompt: I need to add a new 'Workflow' metadata type to the console admin panel. It should show in the system hub, have a list page with name/status/trigger columns, and a create dialog with name and trigger object fields.
evals.expected_output: Provides MetadataTypeRegistry configuration with columns, formFields, icon. Shows where to add the registration and how it automatically appears in SystemHubPage and MetadataManagerPage.

evals.prompt: I want to create a custom detail page for the 'workflow' metadata type that has tabs for Settings, Steps, and History, similar to how object detail pages work.
evals.expected_output: Provides pageSchemaFactory function, custom widget components for each tab, registerWidgets file, and MetadataTypeRegistry wiring with pageSchemaFactory.

evals.prompt: The sidebar shows wrong navigation items when I navigate from the home page to an app page. How does the console navigation context work?
evals.expected_output: Explains NavigationContext (home vs app), how ConsoleLayout and HomeLayout set context, and how UnifiedSidebar renders different items based on context.

evals.prompt: I have a plain REST API at /api/products with standard CRUD endpoints. How do I wire it to my Object UI grid and form components?
evals.expected_output: Provides a custom DataSource adapter implementation for REST, SchemaRendererProvider wiring, and schema examples with bind for grid and form.

evals.prompt: Set up MSW mock data for my Object UI app so I can develop the frontend without a running backend. I have a Todo object with title, completed, and dueDate fields.
evals.expected_output: Provides MSW browser setup using ObjectKernel + InMemoryDriver + MSWPlugin, objectstack.config with the Todo schema, and main.tsx bootstrap pattern.

evals.prompt: My Object UI table shows 'undefined' for all rows. The dataSource.find() call returns data correctly in the console. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses likely bind path mismatch or missing SchemaRendererProvider. Shows correct data flow: provider → bind → useDataScope resolution.

evals.prompt: Add Chinese and Japanese language support to my Object UI app. I need a language switcher in the header and all form labels should change when the user switches language.
evals.expected_output: Provides I18nProvider setup with lazy loading, useObjectTranslation for the language switcher, and pattern for localizing schema labels via t() before passing to SchemaRenderer.

evals.prompt: How do I format dates and currencies differently based on the user's locale in Object UI?
evals.expected_output: Provides useObjectTranslation hook with formatCurrency, formatDate, formatNumber usage examples.

evals.prompt: My Object UI app needs to support Arabic with proper right-to-left layout. How do I set this up?
evals.expected_output: Provides I18nProvider setup with Arabic locale, direction from useObjectTranslation, RTL-aware Tailwind utilities (rtl: prefix).

evals.prompt: My Object UI dashboard looks broken on mobile phones — cards stack but the sidebar takes up the whole screen. How do I make it responsive?
evals.expected_output: Provides responsive grid schema with Tailwind mobile-first classes, useBreakpoint hook usage, and sidebar responsive pattern.

evals.prompt: I need my Object UI app to work offline — users should be able to view cached data and queue form submissions when there's no network.
evals.expected_output: Provides useOffline hook usage with queue management, sync state UI indicators, and offline-first data flow pattern.

evals.prompt: How do I add swipe-to-delete and long-press context menus to my Object UI list items on mobile?
evals.expected_output: Provides useSwipe and useLongPress hook usage from @object-ui/mobile with threshold and delay configuration.

evals.prompt: I want to create a custom timeline plugin for Object UI that shows events on a vertical timeline. The plugin should accept an array of events with date, title, and description. Walk me through the full setup.
evals.expected_output: Provides full plugin scaffold: package structure, ComponentRegistry registration with namespace and inputs, TimelineImpl component using useDataScope, types.ts with schema interface, and a basic Storybook story.

evals.prompt: I'm getting a namespace collision — my plugin registers 'form' but it conflicts with plugin-form. How do I fix this?
evals.expected_output: Explains the namespace system, suggests using skipFallback: true or choosing a unique base type name, and shows correct registration with explicit namespace.

evals.prompt: How do I create a custom field widget that renders a star rating input (1-5 stars) and integrates with Object UI forms?
evals.expected_output: Shows FieldWidgetProps implementation with value/onChange, star rendering logic, proper readonly/disabled handling, and registration pattern.

evals.prompt: I want to start a new project using Object UI with Vite and React. What do I need to install and configure? Give me the full setup.
evals.expected_output: Provides complete setup: package.json dependencies, vite.config.ts, index.css with Shadcn theme and @source directives, tsconfig.json, and a minimal App.tsx with SchemaRenderer.

evals.prompt: My Object UI components render but they have no styling at all — just plain text and bare inputs. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Diagnoses missing CSS setup: explains need for @source directives, @theme color token mapping, and :root CSS variables. Provides the complete index.css template.

evals.prompt: How do I add the grid and kanban plugins to my existing Object UI project and make sure they're available in my schemas?
evals.expected_output: Shows how to install plugin packages, import them to trigger ComponentRegistry registration, and update @source paths in CSS for plugin styling.

evals.prompt: I have a statistic card in my Object UI schema but the value shows literally as ${data.revenue} instead of the actual number. Here's my schema: { "type": "statistic", "value": "${data.revenue}", "label": "Revenue" }. What's wrong?
evals.expected_output: Identifies that top-level 'value' and 'label' are not expression-evaluated, and provides the corrected schema using props.value and props.label.

evals.prompt: I need to make a button visible only to admin users AND only when the record status is 'active'. Also, the button should show the record owner's name. Show me the correct schema.
evals.expected_output: Produces a schema with combined visible/hidden expression using && operator, and uses props.label with template expression for the owner name.

evals.prompt: What formula functions can I use in Object UI expressions? I need to calculate a sum of order amounts, format a date, and show a conditional label.
evals.expected_output: Lists available formula functions (SUM, DATEFORMAT, IF) with correct syntax examples in schema context.

evals.prompt: We have a React + Vite internal app for inventory. Please create a schema-driven list page for products with search, status filter, row actions, and a create-product action. Use Object UI patterns and include integration snippets.
evals.expected_output: Produces a complete page schema JSON for list/grid behavior, includes integration wiring steps for SchemaRenderer and component registration, and provides a validation checklist.

evals.prompt: 请帮我把现有的客户详情页改成 Schema-Driven UI：需要基本信息、联系人列表、最近订单三个分区，并且只有 admin 可以看到“编辑客户”按钮。项目技术栈是 React + TypeScript。
evals.expected_output: Provides a structured detail-page schema with expression-based visibility for admin-only actions, keeps sections modular, and explains how to integrate into an app project.

evals.prompt: Build a console-like analytics dashboard page in an existing Object UI project: KPI cards on top, trend chart in the middle, and recent activity list at the bottom. Also include action definitions for refresh and navigate-to-report.
evals.expected_output: Generates dashboard schema with layout composition, plugin-oriented chart usage, action definitions as data, and testing guidance for responsiveness and interaction.

evals.prompt: Write unit tests for my custom Object UI plugin that registers a 'weather-card' component. I need to test the registration, the rendering with mock data, and expression evaluation.
evals.expected_output: Provides Vitest tests: registration test checking ComponentRegistry, rendering test with SchemaRendererProvider and mock dataSource, and expression-based visibility test.

evals.prompt: Create Storybook stories for an Object UI form plugin that has create, edit, and view modes.
evals.expected_output: Provides .stories.tsx with Meta definition, SchemaRendererProvider decorator, and story variants for each form mode with appropriate args.

evals.prompt: I need to write a Playwright E2E test that verifies our console app loads, navigates to the dashboard, and renders the KPI cards.
evals.expected_output: Provides Playwright spec with page load, React mount wait, navigation, content verification, and error monitoring.
